title: GWI POS Ansible Result
description: Schema for the raw Ansible JSON callback output file. Written by the Stage 11 wrapper using ANSIBLE_STDOUT_CALLBACK=json. Lives at /opt/gwi-pos/state/ansible-result.json (overwritten each run; history lives in install-events.jsonl). This file MUST always be valid JSON — stdout goes ONLY to this file (no tee mixing), stderr is captured separately to ansible-stderr.log. This is the source of truth for stage11-result.json generation. NOTE: This schema documents the key fields; see Ansible documentation for the full JSON callback structure. Key fields: stats (per-host ok/changed/failures/skipped counts), plays (array of play results with per-task details).

stats.description: Per-host summary statistics. Key is the hostname (typically 'localhost' for local execution). Each host has ok, changed, failures, unreachable, skipped, rescued, ignored counts.

ok.description: Number of tasks that completed successfully without changes.

changed.description: Number of tasks that made changes.

unreachable.description: Number of unreachable hosts (should be 0 for local execution).

skipped.description: Number of tasks that were skipped.

rescued.description: Number of tasks rescued by rescue blocks.

ignored.description: Number of failures that were ignored.

plays.description: Array of play results. Each play contains tasks, which contain per-host results with status, changed, msg, and other fields. Use this to determine which specific roles/tasks failed.

tasks.description: Array of task results within this play.

custom_stats.description: Custom statistics set by tasks via set_stats module. May be empty.
